channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: Celo bets on real AI builders, not hype. Visa tiers unlock on-chain utility, liquidity, and 14M MiniPay reach—only for agents proving real activity. 👀 https://Blockchain.News/news/celo-agent-visa-ai-builders-defi-incentives #DeFi #AI #Celo
